title: Outreach Pressure Check — Phase 19.2

diagnosis.reply_rate: 0% — messaging or targeting may need adjustment
potential_issues: Widget embed pitch may be too technical for cold outreach
Prospects may not see immediate value in embedding a calculator
Email subject lines may not be compelling enough
QFINHUB brand is unknown — trust barrier for cold outreach

next_5_smaller_prospects.reason: Personal finance blog, high engagement, calculator-friendly
Student loan/debt focus, matches debt calculators
Personal finance blog, casual tone, budget calculator fit

pitch_suggestions: Lead with the BENEFIT to their readers, not the widget features
Mention specific numbers their readers care about (e.g., 'Your readers could calculate their exact mortgage payment in 30 seconds')
Offer custom branding/sizing for their site
Include a live example link they can click immediately
Shorter emails — current outreach may be too detailed for cold prospects
recommendation: Hold on new outreach until at least 1 reply received. Follow up on existing 20 on Jun 13. Test shorter pitch format on next batch.
